savePermissionDenied: Permission denied — Typst Studio can't write to this file. Try Save As to a writable location.
saveReadOnly: This file is read-only. Use Save As to write to a new location.
saveDiskFull: The disk is full. Free up space and try again, or use Save As to a different volume.
saveParentMissing: The destination folder doesn't exist. Use Save As to pick a valid location.
